sign_in.title: WeTruck Sign In
sign_in.subtitle: Enter your credentials to manage freight operations.
sign_in.hero_description: Streamline your logistics operations with the most powerful transport dashboard.

errors.captcha_incorrect: The security code you entered is incorrect. Please enter the code from the new image below.
errors.invalid_credentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.account_not_found: No account found with this email address. Please check your email or contact support.
errors.account_disabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support for assistance.
errors.server_error: A server error occurred. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.rate_limit: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.generic_login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
errors.network_error: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.captcha_load_error: Unable to load security code. Please refresh the page and try again.
